channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mildura Weather Update for Today
item.description: The original article from the Herald Sun intended to provide a detailed weather forecast for Mildura. However, access to the full content was blocked due to crawler bot detection. The page suggests th...

item.title: Strategic Case for Establishing Dangote Refinery in Tanga, Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania faces a strategic opportunity to host the Dangote 650,000-barrel-per-day refinery in Tanga. The project is more than national pride; it can transform East Africa’s energy landscape, reduce de...

item.title: Central Bank of Kenya Opens KSh 50 Billion May Bond Auction for Retail Investors
item.description: The Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) has announced the reopening of two long-term fixed-coupon treasury bonds in the May 2026 auction, with a total value of KSh 50 billion. The first bond, FXD3/2019/015, i...

item.title: ICC confirms valid arrest warrant for Senator Bato dela Rosa, local law mandates enforcement
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has confirmed that the arrest warrant issued against Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa is valid, contrary to claims by some Philippine senators. Senate President A...

item.title: South Africa Faces Renewed Impeachment Process for President Ramaphosa
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa of South Africa finds himself back under intense scrutiny following the Constitutional Court's decision to revive the impeachment process linked to the Phala Phala scandal. I...

item.title: Xi Tells Trump to Handle Taiwan Carefully During Beijing Talks
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping meet Donald Trump for one big summit for Beijing. As dem dey greet Trump with red carpet, 21-gun salute, and children dey shout welcome, Xi still yan serious matter about ...

item.title: News article currently inaccessible; original story unavailable
item.description: The content of the article could not be retrieved due to access restrictions on the News Corp Australia website. Readers attempting to view the page were blocked as the site detected crawler bot activ...

item.title: General Dan Caine Faces Scrutiny Over Evasive Testimony on Iran War Strategy
item.description: U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Dan Caine, is under increasing scrutiny following his recent congressional testimony concerning the Iran war strategy. Over nearly 14 hours of quest...

item.title: Independent Tasmanian senator Tammy Tyrrell formally joins Labor
item.description: Independent Tasmanian senator Tammy Tyrrell has officially joined the Labor Party, describing the decision as a 'natural fit'. Tyrrell, who was elected in 2022 and previously managed senator Jacqui La...

item.title: Documentary explores the decline of free speech and open debate on campuses
item.description: Toronto filmmaker Ric Esther Bienstock’s new documentary, Speechless, examines how universities in North America and the U.K. have increasingly stifled debate on controversial issues. The film highlig...

item.title: Oyo APC Aspirants Appeal to Tinubu Over Fair Primaries for 2027 Governorship
item.description: Six APC governorship aspirants for Oyo State don carry matter go President Bola Tinubu, dey beg am make e intervene on wahala wey dey around alleged moves to impose one candidate before the 2027 prima...

item.title: History of Jennie Bauters' Brothel in Jerome, Arizona
item.description: Jennie Bauters was a prominent brothel owner in the mining town of Jerome, Arizona during the late 19th and early 20th centuries. Originally from Belgium, she immigrated to the United States in 1896 w...

item.title: La Salle Players Canino, Provido, and Laput Withdraw from AVC Women’s Cup Roster
item.description: Three prominent La Salle Lady Spikers—Angel Canino, Amie Provido, and Shevana Laput—will not be part of the Philippines national team pool led by Coach Jorge ‘Jong’ Alas for the upcoming AVC Women’s C...

item.title: Oburu Oginga Mediates ODM Leaders to Strengthen Party Unity in Kakamega
item.description: ODM leader Oburu Oginga successfully mediated a tense meeting between Cabinet Secretary Wycliffe Oparanya and Kakamega Governor Fernandes Barasa, whose relationship had soured since the 2022 elections...

item.title: Nigel Farage acquires property following substantial financial gift from UK crypto entrepreneur
item.description: According to Sky News, Nigel Farage, the former leader of the UK Independence Party, purchased a property valued at £3.14 million shortly after receiving a significant financial gift of £3.5 million f...

item.title: Johannesburg youngster chosen as official FIFA match ball carrier for Bafana Bafana
item.description: Luca Human-Maré, a 10-year-old from Victory Park, Johannesburg, has earned an incredible opportunity to walk onto the pitch at the 2026 FIFA World Cup before Bafana Bafana’s match against the Czech Re...

item.title: Chinese Money Plant Leaves Form Natural Voronoi Patterns
item.description: Researchers at Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory have uncovered a remarkable mathematical pattern in the leaves of the Chinese money plant (Pilea peperomioides). By analyzing the plant’s circular leaves, ...

item.title: Continued Export of Tapentadol from India Worsens Opioid Crisis in West Africa
item.description: Indian pharmaceutical firms continue to export millions of high-strength tapentadol tablets to West African countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Sierra Leone, fuelling a deadly opioid crisis despite New...

item.title: Xi Warns Trump That Taiwan Dispute Could Threaten US-China Relations
item.description: During a two-day summit in Beijing on May 14, 2026, Chinese President Xi Jinping warned US President Donald Trump that disputes over Taiwan could severely strain US-China relations and potentially lea...

item.title: Authorities Identify Three Women Who Drowned Off Brighton Beach
item.description: Sussex Police have confirmed that three women who were found in the sea off Brighton beach have been identified. Emergency services were first alerted at approximately 05:45 BST on Wednesday following...
